import React from 'react'
import './Footer.css'
import {Container, Row, Col, ListGroup, ListGroupItem } from 'reactstrap';
import {Link} from 'react-router-dom';
import logo from '../'
const Footer = () => {
  return ( <footer className='footer'> 
          <Container>
            <Row>
              <Col lg='3'>

              </Col>
            </Row>
          </Container>
  </footer>

    )
}

export default Footer
